name: bastion
description: Build tooling for OverPy workshop outputs

scripts.tools:test: pnpm run tools -- test:title-data-sync && pnpm run tools -- test:event-data-sync && pnpm run tools -- test:effect-glossary-sync && pnpm run tools -- test:title-grant
scripts.dev:title-query: pnpm run tools -- sync:title-data && pnpm run tools -- sync:event-data && pnpm run tools -- sync:effect-glossary && vite --config web/title-query/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:title-query: pnpm run tools -- sync:title-data && pnpm run tools -- sync:event-data && pnpm run tools -- sync:effect-glossary && vite build --config web/title-query/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:release: pnpm run build:main:en && pnpm run build:main:zh
scripts.build: pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:dev
